ModMetaData.name: Better Mod Sort
ModMetaData.author: Yan
ModMetaData.description:
!WARNING!
This MOD is still in its early DEVELOPMENT stage and, as its name suggests, may contain many bugs.
Implemented functions: 1. Some error source identifiers.
To be developed: 1. Automatically sort based on error reports. 2. Multi-language support
！警告！
这个MOD还处于早期开发状态，目前名不副实，可能存在很多 BUG。
已经实现的功能： 1. 报错来源标识。
TODO LIST： 1. 根据报错一键自动排序。 2. 其他语言
